name: simplefilter
description: Simple table filtering to display any row that matches the search.

repository.url: git+## Url to your git repository ##

keywords: ## Put some other keywords related to your widget ##
author: ## Author ##

bugs.url: ## Url to your issue tracker (probably Github or Grist forum thread)##

homepage: ## Url to your widget home page (probably Github or Grist forum thread) ##
